strengths: 15+ years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, matching the role's experience profile
Current work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks aligns directly with the AI strategy focus
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and a history of building platforms, workshops, and open-source tools demonstrates innovation leadership
concerns: No formal Master's or PhD in an AI-related field
Title history centers on senior/staff IC roles rather than director-level strategy positions
Limited explicit cloud-platform breadth beyond AWS CDK and Kubernetes deployments

key_factors.factor: Active AI-agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput data systems, exactly the experience profile the role calls for, and he is currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq — directly relevant to the role's AI strategy mandate. His founding of GISCollective, organization of workshops and courses, and consistent thought-leadership through talks demonstrate the entrepreneurial drive and ability to inspire others that the job emphasizes. Combined with cloud-native delivery experience on AWS CDK, Kubernetes, and microservices handling millions of requests per second, he presents a strong builder-with-design-fluency profile well-suited to advising on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption.
